top.name: Sympathy Singularity
top.rules_text: Create a Sympathy Nexus on target tile (indestructible 3 turns). All damage dealt to any enemy within 3 tiles is also dealt to every other enemy within 3 tiles at half value. Your constructs within range deal double damage.

channel.name: Sympathy Singularity (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Full damage transfer instead of half

bottom.name: Capacity
bottom.rules_text: For the rest of the fight: you may have up to 8 constructs on the board (normally limited to 5). All constructs gain +1HP per other construct you control.

channel.name: Capacity (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: No construct limit at all
